response.step_by_step_log:
1. Observed video to identify dialogue segment (00:00-02:06) and music segment (02:06-03:54).
2. Searched "hololive English 3rd Concert ALLFORONE theme song" and identified the song as "All for One" by Hololive English.
3. Searched "\"All for One\" hololive english lyrics" to retrieve the official lyrics.
4. Confirmed the song is primarily in English, so 'original_language' and 'reference_lyrics_og' are in English.
response.global_summary: A segment of the 'hololive English 3rd Concert: ALLFORONE', featuring a dialogue between Takanashi Kiara and IRyS, ending with a transition into a group visual accompanied by the concert's theme song 'All for One'.

scenes.description: Takanashi Kiara and IRyS are talking on stage to the audience.
A slideshow of hololive English members is displayed with the concert theme song 'All for One' playing in the background.
scenes.reference_lyrics_og:
[Intro]
Ooh
Keep up the hype, it's good times, good vibes
Remember this night the rest of our lives (Hey)
Raise up your hands and sway, your light will lead our way
We're shining, all for one, all for one.

[Verse 1]
Just look around and see, it's so incredible
So many smiles in a sea of light
Take one step with me and you'll be dazzled
There's magic in the air tonight

[Refrain]
The hours zoom, zoom, zoom, my heart goes boom, boom, boom
The world is brighter because you believe in...
(Let's sing! ALL FOR ONE!)
The thrill of happiness is all around us!
Jump in, 'cause it's all for one!
(Let's sing! ALL FOR ONE!)
When our voices and hearts unite, we're gonna shine bright!
Together, we're all for one!
(Let's sing! ALL FOR ONE!)
The thrill of happiness is all around us!
(Let's sing! ALL FOR ONE!!)
Hey! We're singing, all for one!
All for one!
Feel the love and the energy!
We're here together, finally!
And suddenly, our hearts beat as one!
(Let's sing! All for one!)
